app.title: OpenWeather
app.description: Use the buttons below to check the weather via the OpenWeather API.

errors.geoNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.

byok.title: OpenWeather API Key
byok.description: This app uses the OpenWeather API. You need a free personal API key to use it.
byok.label: Your API key
byok.removeConfirm: Are you sure? This will remove your saved key.

byokErrors.invalid: Invalid API key. Check and try again.
byokErrors.network: Network error validating the key. Check your connection.
byokErrors.keyRevoked: The API key was rejected (possibly revoked). Set up a new one.

apiErrors.400: Invalid request. Check the entered data.
apiErrors.404: City not found. Check the name.
apiErrors.429: Request limit exceeded. Wait and try again.
apiErrors.500: Internal server error. Try again later.
apiErrors.network: No internet connection. Check your network.
